stan_swiata.opis: Ukraine escalates with long-range domestic missiles striking 900 km inside Russia; ongoing conflict on Poland's eastern border remains the primary security concern.
US and Iran exchanging strikes and threats; indirect risk to Poland via energy prices and regional destabilization.
Israeli strikes continue in Lebanon; ongoing Middle East conflict with limited but non-zero indirect impact on European energy and security.
Zelensky under pressure to resolve dispute with Poland over WWII army unit naming; diplomatic friction between Warsaw and Kyiv.
